expo.name: ProSight
expo.description: Audio-first vision app for document analysis and accessibility

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ProSight to access your camera for image capture and analysis.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ProSight to access your photos and documents.
plugins.microphone Permission: Allow ProSight to access audio for recording.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow ProSight to access microphone for audio recording.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need access to your camera to capture and analyze images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need access to your photos to upload and analyze documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddOnlyUsageDescription: We need permission to save photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: We need access to your microphone for audio features.
infoPlist.NSDocumentsUsageDescription: We need access to your documents folder.
